payload.message: 6:00 AM MT daily morning briefing for Sawtooth Main. Skills: winston-ecosystem-status, winston-heartbeat. Three sections in order: (1) Infrastructure — probe wv2_list_portfolios, wut_list_portfolios, dm_get_cromwell_events limit 1; report ok/unreachable per service; DB inferred from probes; backups not implemented (say so); container-level pending Sidekiq watchdog; lead with failures. (2) Business ops — portfolios, pending actions, Mon-Fri yesterday fetch_only EOD recap, today's schedule. (3) Business data — prior trading day EODHD sync: count symbol_updated from dm_get_cromwell_events sync_complete run; format 'Winston updated N markets from upstream sources (EODHD) on DATE'; if prior day log unavailable state known gap honestly. Address team. FORBIDDEN: perform_daily_analysis, market_snapshot, Runtime Context, menus, full tables, inventing statuses, reusing prior tool results.

7:30 AM MT NYSE open snapshot. Skills: winston-market-snapshot, winston-heartbeat. Call wv2_market_snapshot with {} — fresh tool call required. Prefer movers (status testing/breach_up/breach_down): list symbol, previous_close, current_price, atr_17, atr_multiple. If movers empty, one brief quiet-markets line. Address team. FORBIDDEN: perform_daily_analysis, get_daily_activity_report, Runtime Context, menus, reusing prior tool results.

Hourly MT market snapshot (8 AM-2 PM MT, NYSE session). Skills: winston-market-snapshot, winston-heartbeat. Call wv2_market_snapshot with {} — fresh tool call required. Prefer movers from tool (testing/breach_up/breach_down) with previous_close → current_price and ATR; if none, brief staid/funny quiet line. Address team. FORBIDDEN: perform_daily_analysis, get_daily_activity_report, other MCP tools, Runtime Context, menus, reusing prior tool results.

3:35/3:45 PM MT DM sync relay. Skill: winston-dm-sync-events. Tool: dm_get_cromwell_events only. Post each new event.message to Sawtooth Main. Track event ids delivered today. FORBIDDEN: other tools, menus.

4:35 PM MT EOD delivery for Sawtooth Main. Skills: winston-daily-ops, winston-report-delivery. Call wv2_get_daily_activity_report with fetch_only true. Do NOT call wv2_perform_daily_analysis. Wv2 Sidekiq already ran analysis at 4:30 PM. Todos only from tool payload. FORBIDDEN: Runtime Context, Active Tasks checklist, generic Next Steps menu.
